name: Survivor.io Battle
description: Dangerous zombies have overrun the city, pushing humanity to the brink of extinction! The streets are in chaos, and survival is the only option left. Awakened by fate, you step forward as a lone warrior with unlimited potential. In Survivor.io Battle, one player must face endless waves of ruthless zombies and fight for survival. Armed with powerful weapons, you must move smartly, attack strategically, and avoid being surrounded by the overwhelming horde. Collect mystery boxes scattered across the city to unlock upgrades, boost your abilities, and gain powerful weapons that turn the tide of battle.
instructions: Up - - UP Arow Down - - Down Arrow Left - - Left Arrow Right - - Right Arrow
